title: caralluma adscendens var. adscendens
intro: Caralluma adscendens var. adscendens, a succulent plant species native to the Indian subcontinent, is a variant of the Caralluma adscendens plant, which is a type of cactus-like plant. The plant has been used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to suppress appetite and provide anti-inflammatory effects. It is believed to have several health benefits, including weight loss, improved glucose metabolism, and reduced blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Caralluma adscendens var. adscendens are typically made from its extracts or dried leaves, which can be consumed in the form of capsules or teas.
